Premium Quality: Featuring a sturdy 18th birthday acrylic sign holder with a matching wooden stand, this decoration is both durable and elegant for table displays. Comes with everything you need for quick setup, ensuring hassle-free decoration for your special occasion

Nostalgic & Informative: Includes fascinating facts from 2007 such as prices, population, and popular trends. The 2007 birthday table stand is a nostalgic piece that brings the past to life at your event

Perfect Party/Home Decor: Ideal for 18th birthday parties, this vintage 2007 birthday table decoration instantly enhances the theme and offers a fun and meaningful touch to your celebration. Doubles as a poster holder or table centerpiece, making it a versatile addition to any celebration or home decor

Ideal Gift Choice: Whether for men or women, this 18 th birthday party display decor is a thoughtful and memorable present for anyone born in 2007, blends nostalgia with modern decor for a perfect keepsake
